header: Mega Menu that feels ready to ship
intro_title: Makes movement through the page feel precise with simple labels, clear active states, and compact structure.
intro_text: Makes movement through the page feel precise with simple labels, clear active states, and compact structure.

menu_groups.title: Launch Title
menu_groups.description: Built to show the mega menu with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

menu_groups.title: Workflow Title
menu_groups.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this mega menu easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

menu_groups.title: Signal Title
menu_groups.description: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.

menu_groups.title: Launch Title
menu_groups.description: A sharp, production-minded mega menu using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so visitors can move through complex content without friction.
